paperTitle: Dejavu: Towards Experience Feedback Learning for Embodied Intelligence

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 97.5 · libero object 98.1 · libero goal 96.8 · libero 10 91.2 | Table 1 | Notes: Uses all 4 standard LIBERO suites (Spatial, Object, Goal, Long). 50 evaluation episodes per task across 3 seeds.
